21.reason: [This line resets count to 1 for every character in the word, not just once per word. Should only initialize count when starting a new word.]

69.reason: [Incorrect word comparison: comparing all 100 characters even if words are shorter. Should use strcmp instead. Also, s==100 only if both words have exactly 100 identical chars, which is wrong.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect word comparison: comparing all 100 characters even if words are shorter. Should use strcmp instead. Also, s==100 only if both words have exactly 100 identical chars, which is wrong.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect word comparison: comparing all 100 characters even if words are shorter. Should use strcmp instead. Also, s counts matching chars, but two different short words can have s=100 if trailing garbage matches.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect comparison: comparing entire 100-char array instead of using strcmp. This fails if words are shorter than 100 chars and padding differs.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect comparison: comparing entire 100-char array instead of using strcmp; also, s counts matching chars but doesn't ensure strings are equal]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect comparison: comparing entire 100-char array instead of using strcmp; also, s counts matching chars but doesn't ensure strings are equal]
